name: MahoAko RPG V0.2.5
description:
This is the world of Gushing Over Magical Girls, you can choose your path. will you join the Magical girls or will you join Enormeeta?

HUGE thanks to my buddy @ZeroG for helping me with this bot, please go follow him and check out his bots!

The reason i made this bot is because i wanted to make a good experience for others to experience because that is what i like doing. I hope you enjoy this bot!

This bot is made by @KatsukiKitsune (aka me)

If you do intend to copy my bot then please do not do that. I will take it down as soon as i see it moving onward. Thanks for reading, have a nice day <3
